query: SELECT a.id as arquivo_id, a.nome, a.totalItens, a.itensProcessados, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM demonstrativo d WHERE d.arquivo_id = a.id) as demo_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM recebimento_tiss r WHERE r.arquivo_id = a.id) as receb_count FROM arquivos a WHERE a.id IN (1020280, 1020281, 1020282, 1020283, 1020284, 1020285)
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2xKWvZvidGuv3Qt.root --database 98MRdVE9Uf2ZRMz25bPSye --execute SELECT a.id as arquivo_id, a.nome, a.totalItens, a.itensProcessados, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM demonstrativo d WHERE d.arquivo_id = a.id) as demo_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM recebimento_tiss r WHERE r.arquivo_id = a.id) as receb_count FROM arquivos a WHERE a.id IN (1020280, 1020281, 1020282, 1020283, 1020284, 1020285)
